title: Orenium Legacy
description: Orenium is a mod that adds a new dimension, new ore and a lot of content. That includes tools that are arguably better than Avaritia.
body:
Orenium Legacy is an old mod that is in need for a rewrite, so im doing it.

Welcome to Orenium Legacy, a mod that surely will make you enjoy minecraft better, except its for 1.15.2. Orenium is a mod that adds Orenium Ore, Orenium Blocks, Orenium Tools and some Allan Dimension (he was a great friend btw)

Originally in Curseforge under the name Original Orenium
I hate CF so i removed from there and put it here
